div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 406px; height: 1px; padding-top: 765px; margin-left: 74px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;

div.div:
許可 (即通過)
Apache-2.0 / MIT / BSD-2-Clause / BSD-3-Clause
MPL-2.0 (ファイル単位 copyleft, 隔離で対応可)
PostgreSQL License
ISC / Zlib

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 247, 213), rgb(33, 26, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 406px; height: 1px; padding-top: 765px; margin-left: 514px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
ラベル (通知必須 / 改変時は配布条件注意)
AGPL-3.0 (無改変 + 社内利用 + プロセス分離で義務発動なし)
LGPL-2.1 / LGPL-3.0 (動的リンクで回避)
EPL / CDDL (弱 copyleft)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(251, 229, 229), rgb(51, 32, 32)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 406px; height: 1px; padding-top: 765px; margin-left: 954px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
禁止 (PR ブロック)
GPL-2.0 / GPL-3.0 (強 copyleft, 配布時に感染)
SSPL (MongoDB 系, サービス提供時に全スタック公開義務)
BUSL (Business Source, 時限的非商用制限)
Commons Clause (再販禁止条項)
